calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Continued To Jul-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (by Zoom):
Isabella Corbo, Esq. 415-693-2000 for Plaintiff. (In-person)
Jeff Maurer, Esq. 310-312-4123 Manatt, Phelps & Phillips LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Justus Balentine, CSR #13859, 714-471-2597, justusbalentinecsr@gmail.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED.

Mr.Maurer contests and presents arguments; 2nd COA - Unruh Act violation, privacy right claims, malpractice case does not rise to the constitutional level, IIED COA, complaint does not plead sufficient facts, Negligence claim, ethical religious objections, facially neutral, cite case authorities.
Court comments and poses questions; sex, pregnancy
Ms. Corbo responds to Defense' arguments; TR is correct, disagree with policy, can be applied in discriminatory manner, legally protected privacy right, bodily autonomy, hospital's duty of care, negligence.
Mr. Maurer presents a brief rebuttal.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH D/B/A MERCY SAN JUAN MEDICAL CENTER, MERCY GENERAL HOSPITAL's DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT.

Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Justus Balentine, CSR #13859, 714-471-2597, justusbalentinecsr@gmail.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE

Off Calendar Mar-09-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Dignity Health DBA Mercy San Juan Medical Center and Mercy General Hospital's demurrer to Plaintiffs Rachel Harrison and Marcell Johnson's first amended complaint is OFF CALENDAR.

(see word minutes for full details)

Demurring Defendant is ordered to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
